projects.title: Mad Hatter Lamp
projects.accomplishment: A narrative table lamp drawn from Alice in Wonderland — exploring organic form, warm timber, and storytelling in product design.

projects.title: Wormy — Compost Bin
projects.accomplishment: A home composting system designed for urban kitchens — approachable, odour-free, and genuinely well-designed.

projects.title: Curved Table with Relaxation Space
projects.accomplishment: A solid wood table where the surface cantilevers over a curved alcove — furniture as the smallest architecture.

projects.title: Millet Packaging for a Healthier Tomorrow
projects.accomplishment: A packaging system that connects health consumers with India's indigenous grain heritage through visual storytelling.

projects.title: Graphic Design & Illustration
projects.accomplishment: Character portraits, poster design, and visual storytelling in Adobe Photoshop — a digital practice running alongside physical making.

projects.title: TOSS 2025 — 3D Illuminated Typography
projects.accomplishment: Six 1.5m illuminated letter installations — end-to-end from Illustrator to CNC fabrication and on-ground install.

projects.title: Woodworking Lab — riidl Studio
projects.accomplishment: Demonstration pieces for riidl's woodworking lab — each object makes one machine process legible.

projects.title: Interactive Stress Ball
projects.accomplishment: A sensor-integrated stress ball that responds to squeeze with ambient sound and vibration — for teachers and professionals.

projects.title: Foldable Study Table for Compact Homes
projects.accomplishment: A foldable study table for children in Mumbai's compact homes — ergonomic, space-saving, and independently operable.
